setup_task.sh generates all data dynamically using Python with hardcoded tool and member lists. No external data sources referenced.

privileged_info_summary: The task investigates a damaged tool (T-047 Post Hole Digger) returned by member M-023 (Sarah Chen). The tool was initially in Good condition and marked as Available. Sarah Chen checked out the tool on 2026-02-27 and returned it damaged on 2026-03-08, a borrowing period of 9 days which exceeds the 7-day policy by 2 days. Sarah Chen's contact information is sarah.chen@email.com (555-0123), and she joined the library on 2022-01-10. The task requires identifying this borrower using lookup formulas, flagging her for contact, updating the tool status to damaged, and calculating the overdue duration.
